data.title: WEF Report: How Tokenization Is Reshaping Finance – Part 1
data.description:
The World Economic Forum believes tokenization is a more intelligent means of investing. The use of blockchain is changing the process of buying and managing assets like stocks, real estate, and bonds. In its latest report, the WEF breaks down how tokenization is streamlining financial markets and making them more accessible
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/bitcoin-and-crypto-guide/wef-report-how-tokenization-is-reshaping-finance-part-1/

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-05-22)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.35T, up by 0.77% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $106,100 and $111,880 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $110,679, up by 4.10%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading higher. Market outperformers include HAEDAL, LISTA, and COOKIE, up by 80%, 51%, and 34%, respectively.

Top stories of the day:

Binance Price News: Bitcoin Hits New All-Time High of $109,545 Amid Easing Trade Tensions and Regulatory Optimism

Binance Alpha Officially Lists Tokyo Games Token (TGT)

Binance Wallet to Launch ALLO (RWA) Token Generation Event on May 22

Binance Launches Haedal Protocol (HAEDAL) Airdrop and Listing via HODLer Rewards Program

Ethereum News: Ethereum Traders Target $6K ETH by Year-End as Bullish Options Activity Surges

data.title: PancakeSwap: Optimized transaction routing mechanism and solved data delay issues
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The PancakeSwap team announced that due to the delay in updating TVL data from external suppliers, Binance Wallet Swap failed to select the optimal funding pool for transaction routing in the past two weeks. Currently, the platform has achieved real-time data updates through an internal indexer and restored the optimal routing function. At the same time, the team has worked with suppliers to establish long-term solutions to improve data infrastructure.

data.title: Trump’s crypto czar David Sacks says stablecoin bill is ‘going to pass’
data.description:
David Sacks, US President Donald Trump’s top adviser on crypto and artificial intelligence, said the administration expects the stablecoin bill to clear the Senate with bipartisan backing. “We have every expectation now that it’s going to pass,” Sacks told CNBC on May 21, following a key procedural vote that saw 15 Democrats join Republicans to clear the filibuster threshold. The Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for US Stablecoins (GENIUS) Act is the most advanced federal effort yet to establish a legal framework for dollar-pegged digital assets. Sacks said the bill could trigger “trillions of dollars” in demand for US Treasurys by unlocking stablecoin growth under clear rules
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/david-sacks-stablecoin-bill-senate-passage?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/crypto-whale-makes-history-with-1-1b-bitcoin-bet-on-hyperliquid

data.title: Brazilian listed company Méliuz plans to continue to increase its holdings of Bitcoin worth $26.5 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Brazilian listed company Méliuz plans to purchase another $26.5 million worth of Bitcoin. Méliuz said it plans to raise at least 150 million reais (about $26.5 million) by issuing shares or convertible bonds, and is working with investment bank BTG Pactual to advance the financing plan. Brazilian listed company Méliuz has purchased $28.4 million worth of Bitcoin, becoming the first listed company in Brazil to include Bitcoin in its balance sheet. The company's Bitcoin asset allocation strategy has received high support from shareholders and was passed by an overwhelming majority.

data.title: U.S. Lawmakers Introduce Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. House Majority Whip Tom Emmer, along with Representative Ritchie Torres, has introduced the Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act. The proposed legislation aims to safeguard blockchain developers and service providers who do not hold consumer funds from unjust government prosecution. This initiative seeks to establish clearer regulatory guidelines for the blockchain industry, ensuring that innovation is not hindered by legal uncertainties.
